title: langgenius/dify
summary: Dify 是一个开源平台，用于构建智能体工作流和 RAG 管道，支持丰富的 AI 模型和工具。它提供低代码/无代码界面，可在云端、VPC 或自托管环境中部署，帮助团队从原型快速过渡到生产。项目拥有近 15 万 Star，涵盖 agent、RAG、MCP 等热门技术。
summary_en: Dify is an open-source platform for building agentic workflows and RAG pipelines with rich AI model and tool support. It offers a low-code/no-code interface and can be deployed on cloud, VPC, or self-hosted, enabling teams to move from prototype to production quickly. With nearly 150k stars, it covers hot topics like agent, RAG, and MCP.
